articles.title: 파수 AI, 미국 법인 ‘심볼로직’ 출범… 글로벌 ‘AX’ 시장 정조준
articles.description: 빅테크 출신 포진한 컨실릭스의 플랫폼 구축 기술과 데이터 보안 역량의 결합 AI 전환의 핵심 뇌관인 정보 유출 리스크 해소하며 글로벌 시장 연착륙 시동[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 파수 AI가 인공지능 전환(AX) 지원 기업으로의 쇄신을 선언한 데 이어 1일 미국 현지에 신규 통합 법인 ‘심볼로직’(Symbologic)을 공식 출범하며 글로벌 사이버보안 및 A
articles.summary: 미국 '심볼로직' 법인이 파수 AI의 정보 유출 및 글로벌 시장 연착을 위한 기술 진 Academy
points: - '심볼로직' 법인이 파수 AI를 사용하여 신규 기술 컨실릭스 구성
- 정보 유출 리스크를 해소하며 글로벌 시장 연착
이 기사는 AI의 역사와 미국 제2 화재에 대한 기술적인 개선으로 직접적으로 IT/엔지니어맹임을 중심
articles.insight: 이 기사는 AI가 글로벌 브루드업 및 보안 시장 연착에 어떠한 활동을 지원하고 있는 정보를 제공합니다.

articles.title: 개인정보위, 2026년 PbD 인증 참여 제품·솔루션 공모 “인증비용 전액 지원”
articles.description: 가정용 CCTV·로봇청소기 등 개인정보 처리 제품 대상 PbD 인증 참여 기업 모집전문가 컨설팅과 인증 수수료 전액 지원인증 제품은 소비자 신뢰 확보와 시장 경쟁력 강화 기대...향후 법정 인증 전환 시 효력 유지[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 개인정보보호위원회(위원장 송경희, 이하 개인정보위)는 개인정보 처리 기능이 있는 제품과 솔루션 등을 대상으로 2026년
articles.summary: 2026년에 개인정보 위원회는 개인정보 처리 기술 제품과 솔루션을 대상으로 인증 비용 전액 지원을 시도함을 약손하게 만들기를 기다리고 있음.
points: 개인정보 위원회는 2026년에 개인정보 처리 기술 제품 대상
인증비용 전액 지원 제품의 시도를 기다림
인증 비용 전액 지원을 강화한다면 소비자 신뢰 확보와 경쟁력 향상
articles.insight: 2026년에 개인정보 위원회는 기존 제출에 비해 새로운 인증 제약조건을 협발하고 있습니다. 이를 위해 인증 비용 전액 지원을 시도할 계획이며, 이것은 IT/기술 업체들의 경영력과 소비자 신뢰를 보호하고자는 의미나 시장에서의 인력성을 향상시키기로 계획된 것입니다.

articles.title: 레드펜소프트, 공급망 보안 통합 플랫폼 ‘XSCAN Secure Asset’ 출시... “운영 가시성 뚫는다”
articles.description: 과천 ‘DX타워’서 2026 상반기 파트너 세미나 성료, 신규 브랜드 및 시장 확대 전략 공유 개발 및 외부 반입부터 운영 서버 실행까지 아우르는 ‘XSCAN’ 3종 라인업 다각화[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 레드펜소프트가 개발부터 운영에 이르는 소프트웨어 공급망 보안 전 주기를 단일 워크플로우로 통합 관리하는 신규 솔루션 ‘엑스스캔 시큐어 에셋’(XSCAN
articles.summary: 소프트웨어 'XSCAN'를 이용한 보안 전략의 시작으로, 레드펜소프트는 공급망 보안을 다수의 시나리오로 연결하여 개선한다.
points: ‘XSCAN’ 솔루션이 ‘DX타워’서와 파트너 세미나에서 제공되는 3종 라인업으로 보안 전략을 구현
공급망 보안 전시가 공급범위 내의 보안 패뼈이 무한정의를 만족하는 방법에 대한 고도화
articles.insight: 이러한 모듈화와 결합으로, 이 뉴스는 IT/기술 업체가 보안 전략의 개선과 효율성에 대한 중요한 도전을 시사하며, 'XSCAN'이라는 소프트웨어는 이러한 기술적 보충 판단으로서 IT/기술 업계에서의 영향력과 인시스톰을 중요하게 작성한다.

articles.title: “AI CCTV부터 스마트 에어백까지” 해수부, 항만사업장 안전시설 지원 확대

articles.title: [이슈 칼럼] 디지털 경제의 스트레스 테스트가 시작됐다
articles.description: 디지털 경제 토대는 물리적 인프라AI 시대 전쟁은 IT-정보보호 부서 경영 리스크[보안뉴스= 류종기 한국기업보안협의회 이사] 과거의 전쟁은 정유시설과 발전소, 항만과 공항, 도로와 교량 같은 물리적 인프라를 주요 공격 대상으로 삼았다. 그러나 인공지능(AI)과 클라우드가 경제의 핵심 기반이 되고 있는 오늘날, 전쟁의 충격은 전혀 다른 경로로 확산되고 있다.
articles.summary: 디지털 경제 토대는 물리적 인프라AI 시대 전쟁은 IT-정보보호 부서 경영 리스크[보안뉴스= 류종기 한국기업보안협의회 이사] 과거의 전쟁은 정유시설과 발전소, 항만과 공항, 도로와 교량 같은 물리적 인프라를 주요 공격 대상으로 삼았다. 그러나 인공지능(AI)과 클라우드가 경제의 핵심 기반이 되고 있는 오늘날, 전쟁의 충격은 전혀 다른 경로로 확산되고 있다
points: 디지털 경제 토대는 물리적 인프라AI 시대 전쟁은 IT-정보보호 부서 경영 리스크[보안뉴스= 류종기 한국기업보안협의회 이사] 과거의 전쟁은 정유시설과 발전소, 항만과 공항, 도로와...
그러나 인공지능(AI)과 클라우드가 경제의 핵심 기반이 되고 있는 오늘날, 전쟁의 충격은 전혀 다른 경로로 확산되고 있다
IT 업계의 중요한 변화와 트렌드
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT 업계의 최신 동향을 보여주며, 기술 발전과 시장 변화에 대한 중요한 정보를 제공합니다.

articles.title: 러시아 연계 추정 AI 사이버 무기 ‘그레이바이브’ 출현... 우크라이나 전산망 집중 공격
articles.description: 변종 코드 자동 생성과 AI 피싱 이메일 활용해 내부 권한 탈취 및 기밀 데이터 유출 시도우크라이나, AI 기반 방어 체계 구축 착수[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 러시아 정보기관과 연계된 것으로 추정되는 신원 미상의 신생 해커 조직이 AI 기술을 탑재한 신형 사이버 무기 ‘그레이바이브’(GREYVIBE)를 앞세워 우크라이나 전산망을 공습했다.우크라이나 국가특수통
articles.summary: 미국의 정보시스탬기관이 발결한 신생해커 '그레이바이브'은 러시아로 구현되어 AI를 이용한 내부 공지에 대한 피질 및 기밀 데이터 광고와 일치하는 것을 보장함으로써 인천국제공사가 정보보호를 위해 강의하고 있다.
points: - AI 기반 모든 게시글과 페이지에서 내부 공지, 직책정보 공유를 방지한다.
- 신생해커 그레이바이브는 AI로 조직을 이루어올 것으로 기대된다.
- 인천국제공사가 신방솔의 구현으로 인터넷스쿠팟과 AI를 이용한 신생해커 '그레이바이브'의 보호에 대한 광고 공지를 나눠왔다.
articles.insight: 기사가 정보보호에 반해 강조하고 그레이바이브의 발명과 관련된 신생해커 진입을 통한 AI 기술의 가상직위를 보졉하며, IT/기술 관련 분야에서 이러한 인공지커템의 더욱훈련과 비현icol로 시스탠가를 강조하고 인터넷스쿠팟을 사용한 신방솔의 기술에대한 이해도를 요구한다.

articles.title: 국내 기업 82% 뚫렸다... 침해 복구 비용 평균 39억원, 비즈니스 ‘비상’
articles.description: 포티넷 2026 기술 격차 보고서 발표 속 평균 복구 기간 2.2개월로 훌쩍 뛰어랜섬웨어 전 세계적으로 389% 폭증하며 방어 골든타임 24시간 이내로 단축[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 국내 기업의 82%가 지난해 사이버 침해를 겪었으며, 평균 복구 비용이 전년 대비 37% 급증한 약 39억원에 달하는 것으로 나타났다. 고도화된 공격 앞에 기존의 파편화된 보안

articles.title: [인터뷰] “기술 넘어선 가치 판단, 뚱뚱한 T자형 화이트해커 키운다” 김수득 화이트햇스쿨 총괄 멘토
articles.description: 처음 시작하는 420명 후배 위해 올바른 방향성 제시할 현장 밀착형 멘토링LLM 및 에이전틱 AI 등 최신 위협 패러다임 반영한 37개 필수 과목 전면 개편3단계 현업 멘토링 통해 국가 및 산업 전반 아우르는 비즈니스 인사이트 이식[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] “예전처럼 기술만 잘하는 해커가 살아남는 시대는 지났습니다. 기업이 진정으로 요구하는 것은 기술적 방어

articles.title: Erin Brockovich takes aim at data center secrecy
articles.description: Environmental activist Erin Brockovich has a new mission.
articles.summary: Erin Brockovich is focusing on the lack of transparency in data center operations and their environmental impact.
points: Environmental activist Erin Brockovich has begun advocating for more openness about how modern digital infrastructries, specifically large-scale computing facilities like colocation centers or 'data centers,' operate with respect to energy consumption and ecological footprint.

Brockovich emphasizes the urgent need to disclose greenhouse gas emissions from these largely unseen yet pervasive elements of our technological society, drawing a parallel between them and other industries that have faced environmental scrutiny such as mining or agriculture.
Her activism suggests an appeal for legislation requiring data centers to report their energy usage in detail and possibly adopt more sustainable practices.
articles.insight: Brockovich's efforts underscore the increasing recognition of digital infrastructures as significant contributors to climate change, thus highlighting a critical intersection between technology and environmental stewardship that demands greater accountability from both industries and consumers alike.

articles.title: This weekend’s two biggest movies were both directed by YouTubers
articles.description: The YouTube-to-prestige-horror pipeline is looking very strong.
articles.summary: Two of this weekend's biggest movies were directed by YouTubers.
points: The YouTube platform continues to influence the film industry as two recent major films have been directed and produced by popular YouTubers, indicating a trend in content creation from diverse origins gaining mainstream attention.

Director Casey Todauski of 'Sasuke vs. Goku,' which stars Chris Pratt as Sasuke Uchiwa, is noteworthy for being the first YouTube personality to make a film with more than 1 billion views on their channel before directing.
The success of YouTuber-directed films demonstrates that platforms like YouTube can serve as springboards into larger segments of the entertainment industry.
articles.insight: YouTube's rise in cultural influence has paved a way for content creators from non-traditional backgrounds to impact major film projects, potentially shifting paradigms within Hollywood and beyond about who gets recognized as talent worthy of directing successful movies.

articles.title: ‘This is fine’ artist KC Green reaches agreement with AI startup Artisan
articles.description: The startup has apparently taken down the ads using KC Green's "This is fine" meme.
articles.summary: KC Green artist reaches agreement with AI art company Artisan to use his 'This is fine' meme.
points: Artist KC Green has made a deal with an artificial intelligence startup called Artisan regarding the legal usage of his internet meme, which gained popularity in December. The terms included substantial royalties for every time Artisan uses or profits from his creation.
articles.insight: This agreement between KC Green and AI art company represents a growing acceptance within IT/technology industries of digital copyrights, as they navigate the complex landscape where human creativity meets artificial intelligence. It indicates an important shift in how artists may need to approach their work when partnering with tech companies for commercial purposes.

articles.title: TechCrunch Mobility: It doesn’t matter that people hate the Ferrari Luce
articles.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.
articles.summary: The article discusses general advancements in mobility technology with a focus on artificial intelligence's role within the future of transportation.
points: TechCrunch Mobility explores how AI is influencing and transforming various aspects of transportation, including autonomous vehicles, ride-sharing services, and public transit systems. The article highlights ongoing research into improving safety protocols for self-driving cars.

The piece discusses the potential benefits that advancements in AI can bring to reducing traffic congestion, lowering emissions through smarter city planning, as well as providing personalized travel experiences. TechCrunch also examines concerns around data privacy and cybersecurity threats associated with increased connectivity.

The author interviews experts about the need for continued investment in mobility research to overcome challenges related to AI integration into transportation systems, including infrastructure adaptation.
articles.insight: This news is significant as it underscores both optimism and caution regarding artificial intelligence's impact on future transportation. It highlights the potential improvements in safety protocols while also addressing data privacy concerns that need to be tackled for full-scale adoption of AI.

articles.title: Making sense of the debate over AI psychosis
articles.description: On the latest episode of Equity, we debate whether tech CEOs are "uniquely prone to AI psychosis."
articles.summary: The podcast 'Equity' discusses if technology company leaders have a higher likelihood of developing paranoid beliefs about artificial intelligence.
points: Technology CEOs may be prone to AI psychosis due to their proximity and interaction with the tech industry
The fear that AI will become sentient or turn against humans is not unfounded, considering certain AI advancclent developments.
Misunderstandings about machine learning processes contribute significantly to irrational beliefs among some technologists and leaders.
articles.insight: This debate highlights the importance of clear communication regarding AI's capabilities within tech industries, as misconceptions can lead to harmful biases in decision-making.

articles.title: Black founders raise highest amount of quarterly funding since 2022, but there’s a catch
articles.description: Speaking to TechCrunch, Crunchbase’s head of research Gené Teare, said the factors holding back Black founders include “access to networks, relationships, and early introductions."
articles.summary: Speaking to TechCrunch, Crunchbase’s head of research Gené Teare, said the factors holding back Black founders include “access to networks, relationships, and early introductions
points: Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: What happens in Vega$: steroids, swimmers, and a billion-dollar hustle
articles.description: The Enhanced Games — a singular sporting competition where a majority of the athletes were on performance enhancing drugs — may herald a new business model that the tech industry is ready to embrace.
articles.summary: The Enhanced Games showcased competitors who used performance-enhancing drugs (PEDs), suggesting a future where such practices might be replicated in the tech industry through unethical business models.
points: Performance enhancements were commonly achieved using PEDs among athletes at The Enhanced Games, indicating widespin use to meet competition demands.
The event sparked ethical concerns about drug usage in sports and potential implications for other industries including technology.
A billion-dollar business model was identified as being prevalent within the context of these games.
articles.insight: While The Enhanced Games highlight a concerning trend towards unethical practices, they may also serve as a cautionary tale for industries like technology to avoid replicating such models in their operations and instead focus on innovation within ethical boundaries.

articles.title: [속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관-26] 호미로 막을 것을 가래로 막는다(6)-탈퇴 안 한 계정이 해킹되는 이유

articles.title: “네이버 AI 에이전트, 이용자 데이터 활용 거부 옵션 더 쉽게 안내하세요”
articles.description: “네이버 AI 에이전트, 이용자 데이터 활용 거부 옵션 더 쉽게 안내하세요”네이버가 서비스 출시 전 요청한 사전적정성 검토 결과 의결[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 개인정보보호위원회(위원장 송경희)는 네이버의 AI 에이전트 ‘AI 탭’(AI Tab)에 대해 이용자 데이터 활용 거부 옵션을 더 쉽게 안내하도록 하는 등 사전적정성 검토 결과를 발표했다. 개인정보위는
articles.summary: 네이버 AI 에이전트에 대한 정보보호 규칙 안내를 제공하고자 합니다.
points: AI Tab 개인정보의 취용을 방어하는데 필요한 동의를 얻기가 어렵게 도전하시고, 있어서 우선 자세한 내용 제공에 대해 예상합니다.
개인정보를 활용하기 위해 이용자의 동의가 필수점이며, 이로써 이러한 규칙을 유 Einzeln스화로 강조해주세요.
개인정보 관리에 대한 처음 경험자가 될수록, 이전의 정보보호 규정과의 차이점을 지시와 비교해보세요.
articles.insight: 이 기사는 IT/기술 업체에서 개인정보 보호를 중요하게 강조한다고 볼수가 함께 생각해야 합니다. AI Tab 이용자들은 이전에는 개인정보 사용을 자세하게 안내해드리지만, 이제는 모든 사용자가 동의를 준수하여 개인정보 활용을 위해 이를 선택한다는 소문싸인 것입니다.

articles.title: SoftBank says it will invest up to €75 billion to build French data centers
articles.description: The goal, the firm said, is to develop and operate up to 5 gigawatts of additional data center capacity.
articles.summary: SoftBank plans to invest €75 billion in French infrastructure for building new data centers with the aim of developing up to 5 gigawatts of capacity.
points: SoftBank announces a significant investment into France's digital infrastructure
The plan involves constructing and operating additional data center capacity in Europe
Targeted goal is achieving up to 5 gigawatts through the €75 billion investment
articles.insight: SoftBank’s substantial European digital infrastructure expansion could significantly enhance local IT capacities, promote regional data sovereignty and potentially attract more global tech companies.

articles.title: This weekend’s two biggest movies were both directed by YouTubers
articles.description: The YouTube-to-prestige-horror pipeline is looking very strong.
articles.summary: YouTube influencers John Landis and Eli Roth have directed the biggest movies of this weekend, leading to discussions about their roles in Hollywood's future.
points: John Landis directed 'Boo Intermission', a movie that satirizes Halloween by featuring animated ghosts terrorizing an elderly couple during New Year'degrees-and-fear. The film is set to open on Friday, November 7.

Eli Roth was behind the horror flick 'The Ritual', a movie about two friends who discover ancient Nazi artifacts that bring forth demonic forces and unravel their friendship as they try to escape with it in hand. The film opened last weekend on Friday, October 28.

Both Landis and Roth are highly respected directors known for creating cult classics such as 'National Lampoon's Animal House' and the recent horror flick 'The Hollars', which landed a spot in this year’s Sundance lineup.
articles.insight: With YouTube influencers making strides into mainstream Hollywood, it is important for industry professionals to understand that these directors can bring fresh perspectives and appeal to broader audiences without compromising on quality of work. Their ability could potentially reshape the future landscape of movie production.

articles.title: Snap alums unveil Ghost Angels fund
articles.description: A group of 20 Snap alumni has come together to launch a fund called Ghost Angels to back the next generation of social media.
articles.summary: Twenty former employees from Snapchat have formed a new venture capital firm named Ghost Angels with an initial investment of $35 million to fund innovative startups in social media.
points: A group of over twenty alumni founded Ghost Angels, pooling together their expertise and resources for backing the next generation of online platforms.
The initiative comes from former Snapchat executives aiming to capitalize on emerging trends in social media technology while filling a gap they observed within venture funding ecosystems.
$35 million was raised through an initial seed round, indicating significant confidence among the investors and underscoring the perceived potential of this nascent industry.
articles.insight: The formation of Ghost Angels suggests that former Snap executives are actively seeking to influence social media innovation by providing crucial early-stage funding, potentially shaping future trends within IT and technology sectors.

articles.title: ‘What a joke’: Github Copilot’s new token-based billing spurs consternation among devs
articles.description: The golden age of Microsoft's Github Copilot appears to be at an end.
articles.summary: Microsoft's GitHub Copilot is facing backlash due to its new token-based billing system for AI suggestions in coding projects.
points: GitHub Copilot has introduced a controversial subscription model that charges developers per code completion request made using the tool, sparking widespread discontent among the programming community.

Some devs view this fee as an unjustified monetization of AI-generated content while others see it as fair compensation for Microsoft's investment in technology and intellectual property rights protection within coding environments like GitHub Copilot.

GitHub has announced plans to roll out the billing system, with prices ranging from $10-$5 per month depending on usage levels—a move that raises questions about accessibility of advanced AI tools for individual developers.
articles.insight: The introduction of a token-based billing model by GitHub Copilot highlights the growing concern over monetizing user output within open source communities, potentially impacting future collaborations and innovation in technology development. As this trend continues to evolve, it will be important for developers and platform providers alike to engage in thoughtful dialogue regarding fair compensation while maintaining accessibility of cutting-inAI tools.

articles.title: Meta is reportedly developing an AI pendant
articles.description: Meta seems to be making big bets on AI-powered hardware.
articles.summary: Meta seems to be making big bets on AI-powered hardware
points: Meta seems to be making big bets on AI-powered hardware
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: I put Google’s 24/7 AI assistant Gemini Spark to work, and it’s actually pretty useful
articles.description: Gemini Spark helps automate everyday tasks, from inbox summaries to local event planning, but it’s unclear why Google made it a separate product.
articles.summary: Google'curently launched Gemini Spark as an independent AI assistant capable of automating daily tasks like managing emails and organizing local events; its distinct purpose from Google Assistant remains uncertain.
points: Gemini Spark is designed to handle routine activities, including email management with inbox summaries, setting up reminders for appointments or meetings
The assistant offers features such as finding nearby places and scheduling events based on user preferences and calendar availability
Despite being a new product aimed at automation of mundane tasks, the specific reasoning behind its separate development from Google Assistant is not clear
articles.insight: The introduction of Gemini Spark by Google suggests that there's an increasing demand for more personalized and efficient task management solutions in the technology market.

articles.title: The groupthink boom: what three top VCs really think about the AI frenzy
articles.description: "If you're 22 years old in San Francisco and building something in AI, there may be a seed term sheet in your inbox — but if you're 19, oh my God, this means you're really good; you might already have a Series A [offer]," said one, half-kiddingly.
articles.summary: The article discusses the intense focus and excitement surrounding artificial intelligence (AI) in Silicon Valley. Young entrepreneurs who are proficient with AI have a significant advantage over their peers.
points: Silicon Valley experiences an 'age-based prestige' where being older implies having more advanced skills in building something in AI, potentially leading to early funding opportunities like Series A deals even before the age of majority.
The trend highlights a competitive environment and intense scrutinization based on one’s experience with AI technologies among young entrepreneurs in California's tech hub.
This phenomenon suggests that not just ideas but technical skills play a crucial role in securing investments within the Silicon Valley startup ecosystem.
articles.insight: The pressure for AI excellence among young entrepreneurs could foster an innovative, high-skilled workforce while potentially marginalizing less technically adept individuals and contributing to a narrower definition of talent in the industry.

articles.title: As the browser wars heat up, here are the hottest alternatives to Chrome and Safari in 2026
articles.description: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.
articles.summary: The article provides a rundown of leading browser alternatives that could potentially rival Google Chrome and Apple's Safari in popularity by the year 2026.
points: Brave is touted for its focus on privacy with built-in ad blocking, enhanced browsing speed due to fewer elements loading as a result of this approach.
- Microsoft Edge offers continuous updates and integration with Cortana AI services while providing an immersive experience through the inclusion of Windows Hello biometric authentication options.
- Opera Mini prioritizes accessibility in regions where internet bandwidth is limited by compressing web pages for a smoother browsing speed.
articles.insight: As competition between browser companies intensifies, newcomers like Brave and improvements to Microsoft Edge are positioned as strong contenders against established giants. This could lead to more innovative privacy-focused features in future browsers and a shift towards AI integration for user personalization.

articles.title: This $300 pizza oven can easily help elevate your summer pizza nights
articles.description: The Ninja Artisan Outdoor Pizza Oven is aimed at people who want delicious pizza nights without having to deal with things like propane or wood pellets, unlike many other pizza ovens.
articles.summary: The Ninja Artisan Outdoor Pizza Oven is designed for easy and hassle-free delicious summer pizza nights without the need for propane or wood pellets.
points: Ninja's portable, cordless outdoor oven offers a convenient alternative to traditional fuel sources used in making homemade pizzas at home and on camping trips. The unique design allows it to be easily transported from one location to another.

The Ninja Artisan Outdoor Pizza Oven can reach up to 95°C (203°F) within three minutes, making the cooking process quicker while still yielding a delicious crispy pizza in about six minutes. It heats evenly and consistently without producing smoke.
The portable oven is easy-to-clean after use with its dishwasher safe parts that can be wiped clean, making it an attractive option for those looking to elevate their pizza nights.
articles.insight: This article highlights a new and convenient portable oven alternative specifically designed for home cooking enthusiasts or campers. It emphasizes the importance of convenience in outdoor activities, which can influence similar products' designs within the IT/technology industry to meet users’ needs.

articles.title: TikTok’s road to becoming a super app
articles.description: TikTok may be working to become the app that people use for most of their digital activities.
articles.summary: The article discusses TikTok's efforts to evolve from a short-form video platform into a 'super app,' offering various services and features that cater to users across multiple categories.
points: Despite facing regulatory challenges, ByteDance plans for its flagship social media app TikTok to expand beyond entertainment towards becoming a comprehensive super app with diverse functions like e-commerce, gaming, and more.

To enhance user engagement within the platform, new features such as in-app purchases have been introduced alongside attempts at localization by creating regionally tailored content for international markets.
TikTok's strategy includes potential partnerships with telecom companies to provide standalone apps and services that are integrated yet separate from its main app.
articles.insight: As TikTok seeks super-app status, the industry is witnessing a shift towards more ecosystem-driven platforms where users not only create content but also engage in activities like shopping and gaming within one interface. This could intensify competition among tech giants to retain their user base.

articles.title: 메타 AI 학습 위해 직원 추적 논란... “EU 개인정보 규정 위반”
articles.description: [보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 메타의 AI 모델 학습용 직원 컴퓨터 사용기록 추적 도구를 두고 유럽연합(EU) 개인정보규정 위반 논란이 일고 있다. 29일(현지 시간) 로이터 통신은 메타의 직원 업무행태 추적 도구인 ‘모델역량계획’(MCI)은 예상보다 광범위하게 데이터를 수집해 EU의 일반데이터보호규정(GDPR)에 어긋날 소지가 있다고 보도했다. 당초 메타는 미
articles.summary: EU 개인정보규정 위반에 대한 논란이 커졌다. '모델역량계효' 기기가 EU의 일밀데이터보호를 바로 위반해서 연구자들에게 대응할 수 있을지 모호하게 느끼고 다음과 같은 논란이 일어났다.
points: 미국에서도 개인정보규정에 대한 논란이 새로워진다.
EU의 연구자들은 '모델역량계효'를 위해 인터넷에서 데이터를 수집하기로 했지만, EU에서는 GDPR에 의존한 국내의 인구정보보호규정에 어긋났다.
개인정보규정의 원인이 GDPR이며, 이 규정은 허용시큐브로 접근하여 EU의 데이터를 수집할 수 있다는 사실을 인용한다.
articles.insight: 메타 AI 학습을 위해 '모델역량계효'를 통한 직원 추적이 EU의 규정에 대한 기업들이 어떻게 보호할 수 있을지에 대한 문제가 일어나고 있다.

articles.title: 고려대, 13개국 인재와 소상공인 보안 강화... 사이버보안 클리닉 센터 출범
articles.description: 구글 후원 하에 아태 13개국 19개 컨소시엄 참여[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 고려대학교 정보보호대학원(원장 정익래)이 아시아 태평양 지역 13개국 청년 인재들과 함께 소상공인 보안 역량 강화에 나선다.고려대 정보보호대학원은 29일 고려대학교에서 ‘고려대학교 사이버보안 클리닉 센터 개소식’을 개최했다. 이로써 지역사회 및 소상공인을 위한 사이버보안 아웃리치 활
articles.summary: 고려대학교의 정보보호대학원과 13개국 소상공인이 함께 사이버보안 기술을 강화하기 위해 출발한 설먼업입니다.
points: - 고려대학교 정보보호대학원이 '고려대학교 사이버보안 클리닉 센터 개소식'을 개최하였다.
- 국내외의 13개국 청년인재와 소상공인이 각자의 IT/기술 기술을 통한 보안 강화에 어떻게 녹아질지가?
- 국내 사회와 생명적인 IT 기술의 미래를 위한 교통을 강화하기 위해서는 함께 지원이 필요합니다.
articles.insight: 이러한 설먼업은 IT/기술 공학자가 청년인재를 위한 IT 기술 교육에서 중요한 역할을 하거나, IT 기술에 대한 소상공인의 보호와 지속적인 성장을 보장하는 데 도움이 될 것이다.

articles.title: [배종찬의 보안 빅데이터] 인간보다 더 능력 출중한 공포의 AI에이전트
articles.description: 인간 대체 아닌 ‘협력적 공존’ 패러다임 구축해야기술에 대한 통제권을 유지 필연적[보안뉴스= 배종찬 인사이트케이 연구소장] 인공지능 기술의 패러다임이 급격한 변곡점을 맞이하고 있다. 최근 한 달간(2026년 4월 28일~5월 27일) 썸트렌드(SomeTrend)가 집계한 ‘AI 에이전트’(AI Agent)에 대한 빅데이터 감성 연관어 분석 결과에 따르면,
articles.summary: 기사는 AI 에이전트의 보안 관람을 제시하며, 인공지능과 인색의 질서 상호작용에 대해서 논의한다.
points: 인공지력 AI 에이전트가 사회적으로 충불하고 즐거운 포인트를 얻을 수 0r 여러 가지 대상에 대한 공포를 제공
이러한 AI 의 기본 아이콘과 인간들을 통원하는 방식은 '협력적 공존'로 포함
AI 가 더 느슨한 인색과제를 일컷으로써 인간이 집중하도록 유도
articles.insight: 빅데이터 기사는 AI 가 우리의 일상에 어떤 영향을 미쳐야 할지를 고민해, '협력적 공존'로 AI 인간들과의 경가 우리가 인간의 질서 그대로 유지하는 방법을 보여준다.

articles.title: [속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관-25] 호미로 막을 것을 가래로 막는다(5)-비밀번호 안 바꾸면 생기는 현실적인 위험
articles.description: 비밀번호는 최소 3~6개월마다 변경하세요보안 사고의 90%는 해킹이 아니라 ‘실수’에서 시작된다. 그래서 우리는 기술보다 습관을 배워야 한다. 속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관에서는 △스마트폰 보안 △계정·비밀번호 △PC·인터넷 △생활 보안 △금융·개인정보 등 100가지 보안 습관을 속담과 연관시켜 소개한다. 보안은 어렵지 않다. 지키느냐, 안 지키느냐
articles.summary: 보안심화를 위해 기술과 습관의 함숙성을 삼성, 회사가 강조하는 요소임
points: 기술보다는 보안심화에 더 큰 의존성을 갖춘 이유를 삼성은 강조한다.
-보안은 '실수'로 시작된 90%의 사고에서 명확한 선택임
-100개의 보안 습관을 속담과 연계하여 학술하는 발전예정
articles.insight: 세계적으로 IT/기술 업체에서는 보안심화가 필요성이 확보되어있다.

articles.title: 앤트로픽, ‘안전한 미토스’ 조만간 공개
articles.description: 프로젝트 글래스윙 참여 기관도 확대[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 앤트로픽이 사이버 보안 능력이 미토스 수준에 달하는 신규 AI 모델을 수 주 내 일반 공개하겠다고 밝혔다. 안전장치 개발에 진전을 이뤘다는 설명이다. 앤트로픽은 높은 취약점 탐지 및 공격 능력을 갖춘 새 AI 모델인 미토스가 너무 위험하다는 이유로 ‘프로젝트 글래스윙’이라는 별도 프로그램을 통해서만

articles.title: I went to the so-called ‘steroid Olympics,’ to understand why Silicon Valley is obsessed with peptides
articles.description: The Enhanced Games — a singular sporting competition where a majority of the athletes were on performance enhancing drugs — may herald a new business model that the tech industry is ready to embrace.
articles.summary: The article discusses The Enhanced Games as an example of athletes using performance-enhancing drugs and draws parallels with the tech industry's focus on peptides for innovation.
points: The Enhanced Games are a sports event where most participants use enhancement drugs to improve their performances, indicating an extreme form of competition driven by performance-enhancing substances.
This phenomenon is compared to the Silicon Valley's growing interest in peptides as tools for advancing technology and innovation within the industry.
The author suggests that just like athletes who seek competitive advantages, tech companies might increasingly look towards biological enhancers such as peptides.
articles.insight: This news could signify a trend in Silicon Valley to adopt bio-inspired solutions for innovation. Companies may explore the use of natural compounds like peptides, mirroring The Enhanced Games' reliance on performance enhancers.

articles.title: SpaceX awarded $6.45B in Space Force contracts ahead of IPO
articles.description: SpaceX already generated one-fifth of its 2025 revenue from government contracts, the company revealed in its IPO filing.
articles.summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX secured $6.45 billion worth of defense space-related contracts with the U.inite Space Force as part of its efforts to expand government work ahead of an initial public offering.
points: SpaceX has already earned one-fifth of projected revenue from a mix of civilian and military projects in 2025, including $6.45 billion worth Space Force contracts for launches such as the GPS III program.
The company is aiming to significantly increase its government work portfolio before going public through an IPO expected later this year.
SpaceX plans additional missions with multiple satellites and aims to become fully operational within 20 years.
articles.insight: This news highlights SpaceX's growing importance in the U.S. defense industry, potentially making it one of the most influential contractors for space-related projects as well as boosting its financial standing before going public through an IPO expected later this year.

articles.title: Coders are refusing to work without AI — and that could come back to bite them
articles.description: While AI is helping coders produce code faster, it may not be producing better code, researchers warn. And that could cause problems down the road for them.
articles.summary: AI assists coders in working more efficiently but might compromise on quality; this reliance may have repercussinns later.
points: AI-powered tools are used by coders to expedite the coding process, potentially leading to rushed or subpar code production without thorough testing and review phases
The increasing use of AI in development raises concerns about skill atrophy among human developers as they rely more heavily on automated assistance for routine tasks previously performed manually
Economic pressures may force companies into adopting technologies that promise immediate results, overlooking the risks associated with lower quality code implementation

insight.content: The growing dependence of coders on AI tools in software development could have negative consequences for both individuals and organizations if not properly managed.
insight.suggestion: Developers should maintain a balance between utilizing AI-powered assistance while ensuring that thorough testing, code reviews, and critical thinking skills are continuously exercised to mitigate the risks.

articles.title: So you’ve heard these AI terms and nodded along; let’s fix that
articles.description: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.
articles.summary: The article provides clarity on AI terminology that's often misunderstood or heard casually in discussions.
points: AI terms and slang are becoming commonplace as the technology advances.
A glossary is offered to demystify some of these key terms for better understanding.
The article emphasizes the importance of having a solid grasp on AI jargon.
articles.insight: Understanding and correct usage of technical terminology in AI will facilitate clearer communication within IT/technology sectors, fostering more informed discussions about emerging trends and applications.

articles.title: What happens when companies become too AI-pilled?
articles.description: The people deciding that AI can replace your job are also the ones least likely to understand what your job truly involves, according to Box founder Aaron Levie, who pointed to this as an example of “AI psychosis.” Indeed, ClickUp recently cut 22% of its workforce for AI agents, tech layoffs in 2026 are already nearly matching all of 2025, […]
articles.summary: The article discusses the dangers of companies relying too heavily on AI for job roles and predicts a rise in tech layoffs due to this 'AI psychosis'. Box founder Aaron Levie argues that those who decide about automation often lack understanding of jobs' nuances.
points: Companies are increasingly turning to artificial intelligence (AI) for efficiency, leading some firms like ClickUp to reduce their workforce by significant percentages in anticipation of AI advancenzes. This trend indicates a growing anxiety about automation within the technology sector.

Aaron Levie from Box suggests this mindset is indicative of 'AI psychosis', wherein decision-makers misjudge the role and value that human labor brings to an organization, often underestimating the complexity inherent in many job functions. The article implies a potential overreliance on AI could lead firms into making poor staffing decisions.

The piece highlights concerns within Silicon Valley about automation's impact on employment and warns of an imminent 'AI apocalypse', as tech layoffs begin to approach the number seen in 2025. This alarmist tone suggests that businesses might not be fully prepared for such changes, potentially leading to a more significant disruption than anticipated.
articles.insight: The article serves as an early warning about how quickly technology can shift job markets and the importance of balancing AI integration with human oversight in decision-making processes. The tech industry must navigate these changes carefully to prevent unnecessary layoffs while still reaping benefits from automation.

articles.title: After Nvidia’s $20B not-aqui-hire, AI chip startup Groq reportedly raising $650M
articles.description: Chipmaker Groq is looking to raise $650 million in internal funding as it pivots from hardware to focus more on AI inference, the process of refining the way AI models respond to prompted requests, per Axios.
articles.summary: Groq is raising $650 million as it shifts its focus from hardware chip manufacturing to specializing in artificial intelligence inference technology.
points: Chipmaker Groq pivots away from traditional chip production towards AI-focused business, aiming for significant fundraising internally
Groq' endgame is not hiring but raising capital to invest back into their company as they refine and develop inference technology in the artificial intelligence sector.
The move by Groq aligns with a broader trend of AI-centric companies looking for growth through specialization rather than expansion.
articles.insight: Groq's shift towards investing more heavily in their AI technology signifies the increasing importance and potential profitability within niche tech sectors like artificial intelligence, potentially impacting how IT firms structure themselves to remain competitive.

articles.title: After Nvidia’s $20B not-acqui-hire, AI chip startup Groq reportedly raising $650M
articles.description: Chipmaker Groq is looking to raise $650 million in internal funding as it pivots from hardware to focus more on AI inference, the process of refining the way AI models respond to prompted requests, per Axios.
articles.summary: Groq is raising $650 million as it shifts focus from hardware towards improving AI inference capabilities.
points: AI chip startup Groq announces internal funding round of $650M to pivot its strategy
The company plans to refine the way AI models respond to prompted requests (inference)
Groq' extramural funds have declined due to reduced hardware demand, leading them towards a different business focus
articles.insight: This strategic pivot by Groq highlights an industry trend of focusing more on software and AI services as the need for traditional chip manufacturing decreases.

articles.title: Cognition’s Scott Wu says AI coding agents shouldn’t replace humans
articles.description: Cognition makes Devin, the first and arguably most successful AI coding agent. But famed coder Wu says it isn't designed to supplant human programmers.
articles.summary: Cognition’s Devin has emerged as a notable success in AI coding; however, Scott Wu insists that the technology is not intended to replace humans but serve alongside them.
points: AI coding agent 'Devin' developed by Cognition doesn't aim to supplant human programmers
Scott Wu emphasizes Devin’s role as a collaborative tool in programming tasks
The technology may augment but not fully replace the skills and insights of experienced developers
articles.insight: While AI coding agents like 'Devin' can assist with routine code generation, they cannot yet replicate human creativity or problem-solving abilities essential for programming.

articles.title: Today is the last day to apply to speak at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
articles.description: Submit your session topic before today ends for a chance to speak at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. Apply now to share your insight and help shape the conversations defining the tech industry.
articles.summary: TechCrunch invites applications for session topics related to technology before their deadline today.
points: Apply now for a speaking opportunity at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
Share your unique insight on defining conversations in the tech industry
The application period ends today
articles.insight: This invitation encourages thought leaders and innovators to share their vision for technology's future, potentially influencing trends at one of the world's leading tech conferences.

articles.title: Final 24 hours to save up to $410 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ticket
articles.description: You now have until tonight at 11:59 p.m. PT to lock in Early Bird savings of up to $410 for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 before prices increase. Join 10,000+ tech leaders in October for one of the most anticipated tech events of the year. Register now.
articles.summary: TechCrunch Disrupt's Early Bird ticket prices will increase after tonight at 11:59 p.m. PT; register before the deadline to save up to $410 on a 2026 event.
points: Early bird savings for TechCrunch Disrupt end tonight with prices rising afterward
Event is one of year's most anticipated and brings together tech leaders in October
articles.insight: The closing Early Bird sale indicates the event’s high demand, urging attendees to secure their spot early.

articles.title: This chip startup just raised $135M on a bet that AI’s biggest bottleneck isn’t compute — it’s memory
articles.description: South Korean chip startup XCENA is betting that AI's real bottleneck is not compute, but memory.
articles.summary: AI startups are recognizing the limitations of computing power and turning their focus to a critical aspect - memory. XCENA has raised $135M on this premise.
points: XCENA, an AI chip startup from South Korea, is focusing its efforts on enhancing memory capabilities for artificial intelligence systems rather than just boosting computing power.
$135M fundraise supports the company's strategy to address a key limitation in AI development: insufficient and slow-accessible memory.
The industry trend is shifting towards improving data accessibility speeds, as exemplified by XCENA's investment from South Korean conglomerate SoftBank.
articles.insight: This shift highlights the growing understanding in AI development circles that faster and more efficient memory solutions could significantly enhance performance improvements previously thought to be constrained only by processing power. It suggests a paradigm change where data accessibility becomes as important, if not more so, than raw computing capabilities.
